decisions.summary: Do not re-implement the boot-death fixes already on origin/main (163e63c01 sandbox translate, eb79b04cf work-tui mode, 5e05abc06 config-driven permissions, b0a223c72 readiness detection, 31760795c kickoff pointer, 9857b1ac1 reset-session). This issue now covers the remaining fail-fast, truthfulness, diagnostics, and thread-id gaps.

Boot-outcome contract: spawnAgent THROWS a typed AgentBootError (agentId, harness, phase, diagnostic tail) when the tmux session is dead after kickoff delivery resolution, after marking agent state stopped. Kickoff-failed-but-ALIVE keeps the existing ghost lifecycle (status running, kickoffDelivered false, deacon redelivers) — locked by tests/integration/agent-spawning.test.ts:357-512.

Boot diagnostics use a bounded tmux remain-on-exit window: set on at work-agent session creation, capture dead-pane tail to <agentDir>/boot-failure.log on boot death then kill the session, flip the option off immediately after readiness succeeds. Chosen over stderr redirection, which risks breaking TUI rendering.

Codex thread-id for work-tui agents resolves lazily (read codex-thread-id file, else scan per-agent codex-home/sessions for newest rollout, write back) instead of a background poller at spawn — a post-spawn poller would hold the CLI process open, the very hang this issue fixes.

pan start ends with explicit process.exit(0) after the success summary (precedent: close.ts:217, health.ts:175, dev.ts:678). The fire-and-forget tracker transition is not flushed first — it has had the whole boot duration to land and is best-effort by design.

hazards.summary: feature/pan-1803 has unmerged changes to deliverInitialPromptWithRetry (kickoff file moved to agent dir) and buildCodexCommand (--skip-git-repo-check removal). Rebase conflicts in agents.ts/launcher-generator.ts are likely.
hazards.mitigation: Do not reimplement PAN-1803's changes. Keep this issue's edits surgical; on conflict, preserve 1803's hunks and re-apply ours around them.

hazards.summary: remain-on-exit changes 'tmux session missing' semantics the deacon orphan patrol relies on: during the boot window a dead agent's session still exists (pane dead).
hazards.mitigation: Keep the window bounded: flip remain-on-exit off right after readiness; kill the remained session immediately after capturing the pane tail. Patrol cadence is 60s, boot window is ≤~60s + capture, so at most one patrol cycle sees the remained pane — verify it does not mis-classify (it checks session existence, so a remained session reads as 'running'; acceptable for one cycle).

hazards.summary: spawnAgent is reachable from the dashboard start route — throwing AgentBootError there must surface as a clean non-2xx, not a crash, and state must already be 'stopped' before the throw so no half-spawned 'running' record lingers.
hazards.mitigation: Mark state stopped BEFORE throwing; add a route-level assertion in tests (legacy field rejection tests in tests/integration/agent-spawning.test.ts:836+ show the route test pattern).

hazards.summary: Delay-based tests (readiness polls, retry loops) OOM the suite if they use real timers (repo rule).
hazards.mitigation: vi.useFakeTimers() + vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync() in every new test; never real setTimeout waits; never maxForks workarounds.

hazards.summary: Work-tui codex resume ignores resumeSessionId — buildCodexCommand's work-tui branch always launches a fresh TUI, losing session context on deacon auto-resume.
hazards.mitigation: Out of scope here (NonGoal). The work agent should NOT fix it in this issue; surface it as a follow-up issue candidate during review if not already tracked.

hazards.summary: Workspace .pan/spec.vbrief.json contained a stale PAN-1788 plan at planning start (inherited from branch point).
hazards.mitigation: Overwritten by this planning session's PAN-1799 vBRIEF; pan start's validatePlanMatchesIssue would otherwise have refused to spawn.

sessionHistory.note: Auto planning session for PAN-1799. Established that the boot-death root causes were hotfixed on main same-day (see D1); planned the remaining fail-fast/truthful-exit/diagnostics/thread-id work. PRD draft at .pan/drafts/PAN-1799.md.
